`,(0,C.jsx)(e.p,{children:"A well-designed architecture serves two essential purposes in mobile development: it provides the foundation for building robust, maintainable apps, and it creates a shared language that helps developers collaborate effectively."}),`
`,(0,C.jsx)(e.p,{children:"Mobile apps can be built using several architectural approaches. These UI layer architectures typically work alongside other patterns to create complete solutions."}),`
`,(0,C.jsx)(e.p,{children:"Let's explore key architectural concepts we might encounter during interviews. `,(0,C.jsx)(e.p,{children:"Data starts at a source (e.g., a database) and flows through the app until it reaches its final destination, typically the UI. `,(0,C.jsx)(e.p,{children:"This one-way flow, as shown in Figure 1, brings several key benefits:"}),`
